one_time_description: Natural resource contracts income of $13,425,010 in 2023 versus $2,711,626 in 2022, representing a significant non-recurring increase likely related to resource development activities
economic_notes: Nak'azdli owns or has interests in multiple business entities including Carrier Food & Fuel Ltd., Nak'al Koh Timber Ltd., NDC LNG Limited Partnership, Nak'azdli Summit Camp Limited Partnership, BioNorth Holdings Limited Partnership (40%), a grocery store (Sana'aih Market), logging operations (Nak'al Koh Logging and Ta Da Chun Timber), and a gas station (Nahounli Creek Gas Bar). Equity income from GBEs was $1,794,646. BioNorth Holdings LP had revenues of $34,669,000 in 2023.
notes: Fiscal year is 2023 not 2024. The financial statements consolidate 8 subsidiaries fully and account for 5 GBEs on modified equity basis. Significant increase in 'Natural resource contracts' revenue ($13.4M vs $2.7M prior year) drove large surplus. Sana'aih Market and logging/gas bar entities were reclassified from GBE to fully consolidated in current year. Total expenses shown include GBE expenses of $8,058,923. current_liabilities estimated as accounts payable $7,642,184 plus bank indebtedness $96,524 plus current portion of long-term debt ~$553,483 less deferred revenue already separated; total_government_transfers includes ISC $9,484,381 + Province of BC $10,610,330 + FNHA $2,312,602 + CMHC $51,620 + PGNAETA $432,851 = $22,891,784. OSR = $43,648,120 - $22,891,784 = $20,756,336. No schedule of remuneration included in the provided text. Prior year expense total from segmented information used ($38,394,808 includes GBE expenses). Prior revenue includes only non-GBE lines: $32,588,945.
